OUR EXPERTISE

Comprehensive Fire Protection Solutions

Commercial

Complete systems for high-rises, retail centers, and professional offices compliant with all local fire codes.

Request Inspection →

Industrial

Specialized hazard protection for warehouses and manufacturing facilities.

Institutional

Life safety systems for hospitals, schools, and government buildings.

Residential

Multi-family and high-end residential protection — safety meets interior aesthetics.
VIGILANCE & COMPLIANCE

NFPA 25 Inspection & Testing

Stay compliant and protected with our rigorous inspection protocols. We ensure your system meets all local fire codes and NFPA standards, providing detailed documentation for fire marshals and insurance providers.

  • task_alt
    Annual & Quarterly Inspections Comprehensive checks of valves, pipes, and sprinkler heads per NFPA 25 schedules.
  • task_alt
    Main Drain & Water Flow Tests Verification of adequate water supply and alarm functionality.
  • task_alt
    Deficiency Corrections Rapid repair of any items found during the inspection process.
Schedule an Inspection
45+ Years of Continuous NJ Safety Service
emergency_home

24/7 Emergency Repairs

A leak or system failure can't wait. Our rapid-response teams are on standby 24 hours a day, 365 days a year to keep your facility protected.

IMMEDIATE ASSISTANCE 732-521-1666
